Off Calendar Mar-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Howard Underwood, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: Salvio Street, LLC
No other appearance.

Ruling:
Tentative Ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' Motion To Compel Albert Lee To Produce Responsive Documents Or Bar Their Use At Trial is granted in part and denied in part. Privilege does attach to the fee agreement, and that privilege has not been waived. The court does not make an order at this time that would bar the use of the fee agreement at trial. However, the purposes of pre-trial discovery would not be served by allowing Mr. Lee to waive the privilege at any time at his choosing. Mr. Lee must waive the privilege or obtain the waiver from the clients no later than March 21, 2008 or forego his right to use the document at trial. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
